creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #7)
Yes, that sounds likely to me.  But if that proves difficult, an alternative would be to reintroduce the patch-vendor_nix-0.28.0_src_sys_signal.rs file that was removed in 05961664b7f01ac5ed3e9352d43c2aa1ae3028b5 (PR #282518).  It should be harmless, but it might help to regenerate a newer rust-bootstrap
